description: A control room operator oversees a fleet of autonomous drill rigs, assigning them tasks and monitoring their performance.

nodes.task_description: Upload a new drill pattern design to the autonomous drilling system.

expected_outcome.value: The new pattern is loaded and ready to be assigned.

nodes.task_description: Assign the new drill pattern to an available autonomous drill rig (ADR-03).

expected_outcome.value: The drill rig receives the instruction, automatically travels to the location, and begins drilling the pattern.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the drill's progress and performance remotely, receiving alerts for any faults or deviations.

expected_outcome.value: The operator supervises the drill's automated work, ensuring it completes the pattern efficiently.
